mapper.update:
INSERT INTO tb_cs_menu_user (user_seq, menu_seq, menu_rights, down_rights, base_menu_seq) VALUES
(#{userInfo.seq}, #{item.key}, #{item.editYn}, #{item.downYn}, 0)

INSERT INTO tb_cs_menu_base (auth_seq, menu_seq, menu_rights, down_rights) VALUES
(#{menuInfo.seq}, #{item.key}, #{item.editYn}, #{item.downYn})
mapper.select: SELECT menu_name FROM tb_cs_menu_main WHERE menu_parent_seq = 0
SELECT auth_seq as authSeq, auth_name as authName, auth_type as authType FROM tb_cs_menu_auth WHERE use_yn =1
SELECT case when menu_level = 100 then "ROLE_ADMIN" when menu_level = 0 then "ROLE_USER" end AS authorityName , url AS url FROM tb_cs_menu
SELECT seq AS seq ,menu_code AS menuCode ,menu_main AS menuMain ,menu_sub AS menuSub ,menu_level AS menuLevel ,menu_count AS menuCount FROM tb_cs_menu
